name_cn:
Premium
Medium 🔥🔥🔥
Fendi Denim Series Mama Baguette! Double F embroidery combined with retro denim elements and modern design, easily creating a lazy yet stylish look. The grey-blue denim and hazelnut brown) patchwork is super retro. Comes with a calf leather long shoulder strap and short wrist strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody. Just pick it up and the premium feel is maxed out!
Size: 26.5cm×18cmx8.50cm
